title: Tinkers' Thinking
description: An addon mod that add some item for Tinkers' Construct
body:
Tinkers' Thinking is an addon mod for [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct),This mod includes many related features, including :
- More staffs,made by quartz,magma,clay,amethyst and even blood,they all have their own speciality

- Pails,lager than vanilla bucket,can  be modifiered as well.

- Some modifiers

- Two new materials--Dusk and Soupium,they both are slime material.

- Paxel,a versatile mining tool. It is suitable to even almost all kinds of blocks,but does more rocks and logs.

- Knife,a kind of cheap lightweight weapon, is also applicable to cutting ingredients.

- There will be more in the furture...

 Tinkers' Thinking Also add some items back,which has been removed by Tinkers' Construct now:

- Tinkers' Bronze

- Gelatinous Slime Drops

- Ardite, can be found in the bottom of nether.

- Jerkys

- Cactus,Netherrack,Prismarine,Sponge and Paper tool materials.

 Tinkers' Thinking need at least [Tinkers' Construct build](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) 3.6.1. 
Versions below 0.1.0.0  also need to install [Json Things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/json-things).
